title: Smart.
content:
Stripes, justly given, yerk us with their fall;
    But causeless whipping smarts the most of all.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Smart.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
